name: multiDay
_note: forecast.multiDay returns N (2-14, default 7) daily windows with honestly range-decaying confidence, off a freshly composed base. World-public read — {} returns ok:true. days is a fail-CLOSED numeric: a poisoned value (negative/NaN/Infinity/1e308) returns ok:false invalid_days, never a clamped ok:true. outlook.length always equals the resolved days.
